HomeDestinationsLepchajagat
West Bengal

Lepchajagat

The Lepcha Heritage Village

Dawn breaking over heritage cottages, amber light painting stories of Lepcha culture on wooden walls.

4.5
(88 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
19°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Lepchajagat

Lepchajagat is a quaint village that preserves the rich Lepcha culture and offers some of the best sunrise views over the Himalayas.

A village inhabited by the indigenous Lepcha community, offering authentic cultural experiences.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
1,950 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.5 (88 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
